requirement_topic.en: EAC Conformity Mark — Multi-Regulation Assessment (TR CU 004 + TR CU 020 + TR EAEU 037)
requirement_topic.zh: EAC合格标志——多法规评定（TR CU 004 + TR CU 020 + TR EAEU 037）
requirement_topic.zht: EAC合格標誌——多法規評定（TR CU 004 + TR CU 020 + TR EAEU 037）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances placed on the Armenian market must bear the single EAC conformity mark （ЕАС, Eurasian Conformity）, demonstrating conformity with all applicable EAEU Technical Regulations. For a standard household refrigerator this means conformity with at minimum: (1) TR CU 004/2011 — low-voltage electrical safety; (2) TR CU 020/2011 — electromagnetic compatibility; and (3) TR EAEU 037/2016 — restriction of hazardous substances (RoHS-style). Conformity is established through certification (by an EAEU-accredited certification body) or, where the regulation permits, a declaration of conformity registered in the EAEU register; both routes require testing in an EAEU-accredited laboratory and a technical file. After a positive assessment, the EAC mark is affixed to the product and packaging, and the manufacturer/importer keeps the certificate(s) or declaration(s) and supporting technical documentation. Unlike the EU CE system, EAC certification commonly requires third-party involvement and an applicant established in the EAEU.
summary.zh: 投放亚美尼亚市场的家用制冷器具须加贴统一的EAC合格标志（ЕАС，欧亚合格认证），以证明符合所有适用的EAEU技术法规。对于标准家用电冰箱，至少须符合：（1）TR CU 004/2011——低压电气安全；（2）TR CU 020/2011——电磁兼容；（3）TR EAEU 037/2016——有害物质限制（RoHS式）。合格性通过认证（由EAEU认可认证机构进行）或在法规允许时通过在EAEU登记册登记的合格声明予以确立；两种路径均须在EAEU认可实验室检测并备有技术文件。评定通过后，EAC标志加贴于产品和包装，制造商/进口商须保存证书或声明及支撑技术文件。与欧盟CE制度不同，EAC认证通常需要第三方参与及在EAEU境内设立的申请人。
summary.zht: 投放亞美尼亞市場的家用製冷器具須加貼統一的EAC合格標誌（ЕАС，歐亞合格認證），以證明符合所有適用的EAEU技術法規。對於標準家用電冰箱，至少須符合：（1）TR CU 004/2011——低壓電氣安全；（2）TR CU 020/2011——電磁相容；（3）TR EAEU 037/2016——有害物質限制（RoHS式）。合格性通過認證（由EAEU認可認證機構進行）或在法規允許時通過在EAEU登記冊登記的合格聲明予以確立；兩種路徑均須在EAEU認可實驗室檢測並備有技術文件。評定通過後，EAC標誌加貼於產品和包裝，製造商/進口商須保存證書或聲明及支撐技術文件。與歐盟CE制度不同，EAC認證通常需要第三方參與及在EAEU境內設立的申請人。

standards_or_laws: TR CU 004/2011 — On the safety of low-voltage equipment (electrical safety)
TR CU 020/2011 — On electromagnetic compatibility of technical means (EMC)
TR EAEU 037/2016 — On restriction of the use of hazardous substances in electrical and electronic products (RoHS-style)
EAC (Eurasian Conformity) mark — single EAEU conformity marking affixed after certification or registered declaration

summary.en: In China, household refrigerating appliances require China Compulsory Certification (CCC) covering both safety (GB 4706.13) and EMC (GB 4343.1) before sale, administered by CNCA-designated certification bodies; CCC is a mandatory third-party certification and does not use manufacturer self-declaration. Energy labelling (China Energy Label based on GB 12021.2) and China RoHS 2 marking are separate mandatory requirements. There is no single EAC-equivalent mark in China: CCC covers safety/EMC, the China Energy Label covers energy, and China RoHS handles hazardous substances, each issued and displayed separately.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用制冷器具在销售前须取得中国强制认证（CCC），涵盖安全（GB 4706.13）和电磁兼容（GB 4343.1），由CNCA指定认证机构审核；CCC为强制性第三方认证，不采用制造商自我声明。能效标识（基于GB 12021.2的中国能效标识）和中国RoHS 2标识为独立的强制性要求。中国没有单一等同于EAC的标识：CCC涵盖安全/电磁兼容，中国能效标识涵盖能效，中国RoHS处理有害物质，分别颁发和展示。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用製冷器具在銷售前須取得中國強制認證（CCC），涵蓋安全（GB 4706.13）和電磁相容（GB 4343.1），由CNCA指定認證機構審核；CCC為強制性第三方認證，不採用製造商自我聲明。能效標識（基於GB 12021.2的中國能效標識）和中國RoHS 2標識為獨立的強制性要求。中國沒有單一等同於EAC的標識：CCC涵蓋安全/電磁相容，中國能效標識涵蓋能效，中國RoHS處理有害物質，分別頒發和展示。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — safety (GB 4706.13) + EMC (GB 4343.1); mandatory; administered by CNCA/SAMR
China Energy Label — Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR); based on GB 12021.2-2015
China RoHS 2 — Administrative Measures for the Restriction of the Use of Hazardous Substances in Electrical and Electronic Products (MIIT et al., 2016)

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers must build a complete EAEU conformity package — CCC, China Energy Label and China RoHS do not substitute for any EAEU requirement: (1) EAC certificate(s) or registered declaration(s) — covering TR CU 004, TR CU 020 and TR EAEU 037, issued via an EAEU-accredited body; (2) Technical file — test reports to GOST IEC 60335-2-24, GOST CISPR 14, and GOST IEC 62321 (or accepted IEC/CB equivalents), risk assessment, drawings, circuit diagrams, and BOM, in Russian; (3) EAC mark physically affixed to product and packaging; (4) EAEU energy-efficiency label (separate from EAC conformity); (5) an applicant/importer established in the EAEU to hold the certificate or lodge the declaration (see frigam-market-002). Because the EAEU standards are IEC-derived, existing IEC / CB Scheme test data may reduce re-testing, but the certificates/declarations themselves must be issued within the EAEU framework.
gap.zh: 中国制造商须从头建立完整的EAEU合规文件包——CCC、中国能效标识和中国RoHS均不能替代任何EAEU要求：（1）EAC证书或登记声明——涵盖TR CU 004、TR CU 020及TR EAEU 037，经EAEU认可机构出具；（2）技术文件——依据GOST IEC 60335-2-24、GOST CISPR 14及GOST IEC 62321（或被接受的IEC/CB等效文件）的检测报告、风险评估、图纸、电路图及物料清单，并以俄语呈现；（3）在产品和包装上实物加贴EAC标志；（4）EAEU能效标签（独立于EAC合格）；（5）在EAEU境内设立的申请人/进口商以持有证书或登记声明（详见frigam-market-002）。由于EAEU标准源自IEC，现有IEC/CB体系检测数据或可缩减重新检测，但证书/声明本身须在EAEU框架内出具。
gap.zht: 中國製造商須從頭建立完整的EAEU合規文件包——CCC、中國能效標識和中國RoHS均不能替代任何EAEU要求：（1）EAC證書或登記聲明——涵蓋TR CU 004、TR CU 020及TR EAEU 037，經EAEU認可機構出具；（2）技術文件——依據GOST IEC 60335-2-24、GOST CISPR 14及GOST IEC 62321（或被接受的IEC/CB等效文件）的檢測報告、風險評估、圖紙、電路圖及物料清單，並以俄語呈現；（3）在產品和包裝上實物加貼EAC標誌；（4）EAEU能效標籤（獨立於EAC合格）；（5）在EAEU境內設立的申請人/進口商以持有證書或登記聲明（詳見frigam-market-002）。由於EAEU標準源自IEC，現有IEC/CB體系檢測數據或可縮減重新檢測，但證書/聲明本身須在EAEU框架內出具。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EAC marking (covering TR CU 004, TR CU 020, and TR EAEU 037) required before placement on the Armenian / EAEU market; the EAEU energy-efficiency label is a separate mandatory requirement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification (safety + EMC) + China Energy Label + China RoHS marking required before sale in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The EAC mark (covering TR CU 004, TR CU 020, and TR EAEU 037) is mandatory for household refrigerators in Armenia. Chinese CCC, China Energy Label and China RoHS are entirely separate systems — none substitutes for EAC certification or declaration. Because EAEU standards are IEC-derived, IEC / CB test data may reduce re-testing, but certificates or declarations must be issued within the EAEU framework, and an EAEU-established applicant/importer is required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] EAC标志（涵盖TR CU 004、TR CU 020及TR EAEU 037）是家用电冰箱在亚美尼亚的强制要求。中国CCC、中国能效标识和中国RoHS是完全独立的制度——均不能替代EAC认证或声明。由于EAEU标准源自IEC，IEC/CB检测数据或可缩减重新检测，但证书或声明须在EAEU框架内出具，并须有EAEU境内设立的申请人/进口商。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] EAC標誌（涵蓋TR CU 004、TR CU 020及TR EAEU 037）是家用電冰箱在亞美尼亞的強制要求。中國CCC、中國能效標識和中國RoHS是完全獨立的制度——均不能替代EAC認證或聲明。由於EAEU標準源自IEC，IEC/CB檢測數據或可縮減重新檢測，但證書或聲明須在EAEU框架內出具，並須有EAEU境內設立的申請人/進口商。

requirement_topic.en: In-Country Importer / EAEU Applicant — Certification Holder and Customs Entry
requirement_topic.zh: 在地进口商/EAEU申请人——认证持有人与海关通关
requirement_topic.zht: 在地進口商/EAEU申請人——認證持有人與海關通關

summary.en: Under the EAEU conformity-assessment framework, an EAC certificate or registered declaration of conformity must be held by an applicant established within the EAEU — typically the importer or an authorised representative resident in an EAEU member state (Armenia, Russia, Belarus, Kazakhstan, or Kyrgyzstan). A manufacturer established only in China cannot itself hold an EAC declaration; it must act through an EAEU-resident applicant, who lodges the declaration or holds the certificate, retains the technical file, and is the point of contact for the accredited body and market-surveillance authorities. Armenia is landlocked, so goods typically arrive by road or rail; customs clearance into Armenia requires the EAC documentation to be in place. The in-country importer is responsible for ensuring the EAC mark, Russian-language documentation, and conformity evidence accompany the goods.
summary.zh: 在EAEU合格评定框架下，EAC证书或登记合格声明须由在EAEU境内设立的申请人持有——通常为进口商或在EAEU成员国（亚美尼亚、俄罗斯、白俄罗斯、哈萨克斯坦或吉尔吉斯斯坦）居住的授权代表。仅在中国设立的制造商不能自行持有EAC声明；须通过EAEU居住申请人办理，由其登记声明或持有证书、保存技术文件，并作为认可机构和市场监管机构的联系人。亚美尼亚为内陆国家，货物通常经公路或铁路抵达；货物通关进入亚美尼亚须备齐EAC文件。在地进口商负责确保EAC标志、俄语文件及合格证据随货同行。
summary.zht: 在EAEU合格評定框架下，EAC證書或登記合格聲明須由在EAEU境內設立的申請人持有——通常為進口商或在EAEU成員國（亞美尼亞、俄羅斯、白俄羅斯、哈薩克斯坦或吉爾吉斯斯坦）居住的授權代表。僅在中國設立的製造商不能自行持有EAC聲明；須通過EAEU居住申請人辦理，由其登記聲明或持有證書、保存技術文件，並作為認可機構和市場監管機構的聯繫人。亞美尼亞為內陸國家，貨物通常經公路或鐵路抵達；貨物通關進入亞美尼亞須備齊EAC文件。在地進口商負責確保EAC標誌、俄語文件及合格證據隨貨同行。

standards_or_laws: EAEU Treaty and EEC conformity-assessment procedures — applicant must be established in an EAEU member state
TR CU 004/2011, TR CU 020/2011, TR EAEU 037/2016 — applicant/holder requirements for certificate or registered declaration
EAEU Customs Code — customs clearance into Armenia requires EAC conformity documentation

summary.en: China has no direct regulatory equivalent requiring manufacturers of export-bound products to designate a foreign-country resident legal applicant responsible for holding the destination-market certificate and cooperating with market surveillance. Under the CCC domestic regime, the certification holder is the responsible party for domestic market compliance only — this role does not extend to or satisfy EAEU applicant or in-country-importer requirements. Chinese exporters typically appoint overseas distributors or trading companies on a commercial basis, without a statutory EAEU-style applicant obligation.
summary.zh: 中国没有直接的监管等同规定，要求出口产品制造商指定一名在目的国境内居住、负责持有目的市场证书并配合市场监管的法定申请人。在CCC国内制度下，认证持有人仅为国内市场合规的责任方——该角色不延伸至EAEU申请人或在地进口商要求，亦不能满足后者。中国出口商通常以商业形式委任海外经销商或贸易公司，但不存在法定的类EAEU申请人义务。
summary.zht: 中國沒有直接的監管等同規定，要求出口產品製造商指定一名在目的國境內居住、負責持有目的市場證書並配合市場監管的法定申請人。在CCC國內制度下，認證持有人僅為國內市場合規的責任方——該角色不延伸至EAEU申請人或在地進口商要求，亦不能滿足後者。中國出口商通常以商業形式委任海外經銷商或貿易公司，但不存在法定的類EAEU申請人義務。

standards_or_laws: N/A — no direct Chinese regulatory equivalent for the EAEU applicant / in-country importer obligation

gap.en: This is a structural gap with no Chinese regulatory analogue. A Chinese refrigerator manufacturer cannot place product on the Armenian market on its own EAC declaration; it must (1) appoint an EAEU-established importer or authorised applicant to hold the EAC certificate or lodge the registered declaration; (2) ensure that applicant retains the Russian-language technical file and conformity evidence and is named for market-surveillance contact; and (3) plan road/rail logistics into landlocked Armenia with EAC documentation completed before customs clearance. Without an EAEU-resident applicant, no EAC certificate or valid declaration can exist, and the goods cannot be lawfully cleared or placed on the market regardless of the underlying test results.
gap.zh: 这是一个在中国监管体系中没有类似规定的结构性差距。中国电冰箱制造商不能以自身EAC声明在亚美尼亚市场投放产品；须（1）委任在EAEU境内设立的进口商或授权申请人以持有EAC证书或登记声明；（2）确保该申请人保存俄语技术文件及合格证据，并被指定为市场监管联系人；（3）规划进入内陆国亚美尼亚的公路/铁路物流，并在海关通关前备齐EAC文件。在无EAEU居住申请人的情况下，无法存在EAC证书或有效声明，无论底层检测结果如何，货物均不能合法通关或投放市场。
gap.zht: 這是一個在中國監管體系中沒有類似規定的結構性差距。中國電冰箱製造商不能以自身EAC聲明在亞美尼亞市場投放產品；須（1）委任在EAEU境內設立的進口商或授權申請人以持有EAC證書或登記聲明；（2）確保該申請人保存俄語技術文件及合格證據，並被指定為市場監管聯繫人；（3）規劃進入內陸國亞美尼亞的公路/鐵路物流，並在海關通關前備齊EAC文件。在無EAEU居住申請人的情況下，無法存在EAC證書或有效聲明，無論底層檢測結果如何，貨物均不能合法通關或投放市場。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — an EAEU-established applicant/importer is required to hold the EAC certificate or lodge the registered declaration before goods are cleared into Armenia and placed on the market
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent requirement — Chinese export manufacturers have no statutory obligation to appoint an EAEU applicant under Chinese law

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] An EAEU-established importer or authorised applicant is a hard gate for the Armenian market: it must hold the EAC certificate or lodge the registered declaration, keep the Russian-language technical file, and serve as market-surveillance contact. A China-only manufacturer cannot self-hold EAC conformity. Road/rail logistics into landlocked Armenia require EAC documentation completed before customs clearance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在EAEU境内设立的进口商或授权申请人是亚美尼亚市场的强制性门槛：须持有EAC证书或登记声明、保存俄语技术文件并担任市场监管联系人。仅在中国的制造商不能自行持有EAC合格。进入内陆国亚美尼亚的公路/铁路物流须在海关通关前备齐EAC文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在EAEU境內設立的進口商或授權申請人是亞美尼亞市場的強制性門檻：須持有EAC證書或登記聲明、保存俄語技術文件並擔任市場監管聯繫人。僅在中國的製造商不能自行持有EAC合格。進入內陸國亞美尼亞的公路/鐵路物流須在海關通關前備齊EAC文件。
